query:
SELECT b.id as book_id, b.title, b.category, p.pageNumber, p.illustrationUrl, p.comicPanel1Url, p.comicPanel2Url, p.comicPanel3Url
FROM books b
JOIN bookPages p ON p.bookId = b.id
WHERE b.id IN (60002, 60003, 60004)
ORDER BY b.id, p.pageNumber;
